subject: A winged blue-skinned humanoid creature in armor, flying over a city, carrying a mechanical device
description: A sphinx-like or leonine winged humanoid with blue-grey skin soars forward through an overcast sky with broad feathered wings deployed. The figure wears fitted armor with circular blue gem details and carries what appears to be a mechanical gauntlet or artifact device. A long tail trails behind. The background below shows urban architecture — rooftops and towers suggesting a dense city. Hair is worn in long braided dreads. The color palette is cool blue and grey with warm brown wings.
foreground: blue-skinned winged leonine humanoid in armor carrying a mechanical device
